hero.subtitle: Send personalised emails and WhatsApp messages to hundreds of contacts. Upload a CSV, write your template, hit send. No server, no API keys, no subscriptions.

heroMessages.msg1: Hey {{name}}, I saw {{company}} is hiring — thought of you.
heroMessages.msg3: Hello {{name}}! Just wanted to reach out about the project.
heroMessages.msg5: Hey {{name}}, I noticed your work on...

platforms.title: Two ways to send
platforms.subtitle: Choose the workflow that fits you best — or use both.
platforms.webAppDesc: Full-featured dashboard for bulk email and WhatsApp messaging. Connect your own SMTP (Gmail, iCloud+, custom domains) or use WhatsApp Web via QR pairing.
platforms.chromeDesc: Lightweight sidebar that lives inside Gmail and WhatsApp Web. No backend needed — everything runs locally in your browser.
platforms.chromeFeature5: 100% offline — zero data leaves your device

features.title: Built for real outreach
features.subtitle: Everything you need to send at scale — nothing you don't.
features.csvDesc: Any column becomes a template variable. Headers are auto-detected — no mapping needed.
features.spinDesc: Write {Hello|Hi|Hey} and each recipient gets a random variant. Every message feels unique.
features.safetyDesc: Per-message delays, random jitter, batch cool-downs, and daily limits keep your accounts safe.
features.progressDesc: Real-time sent / failed / skipped counters. Cancel mid-send at any time.
features.offlineDesc: All data stays on your device. No external servers, no analytics, no tracking.
features.syncDesc: Settings sync across Chrome profiles automatically. Your preferences follow you.

steps.title: Three steps. That's it.
steps.step1Desc: Drop a file with email/phone and any personalisation columns.
steps.step2Desc: Use {{Name}}, {{Company}}, or any column header as a variable.
steps.step3Desc: Watch messages go out one by one with live progress and full control.

cta.title: Ready to send?
cta.subtitle: No sign-up required. Open the web app or install the extension and start reaching people in minutes.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.overviewP1: SendStack — Bulk Messaging ("the Extension" / "the App") is a browser extension and web application for Google Chrome that helps you send personalised bulk emails and WhatsApp messages directly from Gmail and WhatsApp Web.
privacy.overviewP2: We are committed to protecting your privacy. This policy explains exactly what data the Extension and Web App collect, how it is stored, and what it is never used for.
privacy.dataCollectIntro: The Extension stores the following data locally in your browser using chrome.storage.local and chrome.storage.sync:
privacy.tableRow1Purpose: Populate the send queue; cleared when you upload a new CSV or remove the extension
privacy.tableRow2Purpose: Restore your preferences across sessions and Chrome profiles
privacy.tableRow3Purpose: Enforce the daily sending limit you configure
privacy.dataCollectWebApp: The Web App processes CSV data and SMTP credentials entirely in your browser session and on your self-hosted server. No data is stored permanently on external servers.
privacy.noCollect1: No email content is read. The Extension only opens the Gmail compose window and fills in the To, Subject, and Body fields you provide via your template. It does not read, scan, or transmit any existing emails.
privacy.noCollect2: No message history is read. The Extension does not access your WhatsApp message history or contact list.
privacy.noCollect3: No data is transmitted to external servers. All CSV data and settings remain on your device. The Extension makes no outbound network requests of its own.
privacy.noCollect4: No analytics or telemetry. The Extension does not include any analytics SDK, tracking pixel, or crash-reporting service.
privacy.noCollect5: No user accounts. The Extension does not require you to create an account or log in.
privacy.thirdPartyIntro: The Extension does not integrate with any third-party services. It interacts only with:
privacy.thirdPartyGmail: Gmail (mail.google.com) — by injecting a sidebar panel and automating the native compose window.
privacy.thirdPartyWhatsApp: WhatsApp Web (web.whatsapp.com) — by injecting a sidebar panel and navigating to web.whatsapp.com/send?phone=... URLs.
privacy.thirdPartyPolicies: These services have their own privacy policies:
privacy.retention1: CSV contact data is retained in chrome.storage.local until you upload a new file or uninstall the Extension.
privacy.retention2: Settings are retained in chrome.storage.sync until you uninstall the Extension or clear Chrome sync data.
privacy.retention3: The daily send counter is reset automatically at midnight each day.
privacy.childrenDesc: The Extension is not directed at children under the age of 13. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children.
privacy.changesDesc: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. Any changes will be reflected in the "Last updated" date at the top of this document and will be committed to the public repository at:
privacy.contactDesc: If you have questions about this Privacy Policy or the Extension's data practices, please open an issue at:
